v8:item.v8:content: Дополнительные параметры, используемые для инициализации подсистемы УАТ при открытии формы в объединенных решениях
Additional parameters used to initialize the subsystem FMS when the form is opened in the joint solutions
Заполнить амортизацию для ТС в эксплуатации
Fill in the depreciation for the vehicle in operation
Fill in the form with transport tax payments
Fill in the form with transport tax payments
Fill in the parking lot form
Fill in the parking lot form
Fill in depreciation of vehicle components
Fill in the depreciation of work clothes and tools
Fill out the depreciation of workwear and tools
